tagline: Data Scientist and ML Engineer passionate about deep learning, backend automation, and smart data solutions.
description: Data Scientist and ML Engineer passionate about building intelligent systems, Django web applications, and statistical data solutions.

roles.detailed: Data Scientist | ML Engineer | Django Developer

bio: Aspiring Data Scientist and Machine Learning Enthusiast with a strong interest in building intelligent and scalable applications. Skilled in Python, Machine Learning, Data Analysis, and Django backend development for deploying AI-powered solutions. Experienced in working with Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, REST APIs, and databases, with hands-on project experience in healthcare AI and recommendation systems. Passionate about solving real-world problems through data-driven and backend-powered applications.

bullets: Handled worker entry and exit data and maintained accurate attendance records.
Monitored employee working hours, shift timings, and daily workforce activities.
Updated and organized operational records with accuracy and efficiency.
Assisted in workforce data management and reporting tasks.
experience.desc: Operational data entry, attendance tracking, shift monitoring, and records management.

projects.title: Arogya Link

projects.desc: Developed an AI-based healthcare monitoring web application. Built prediction models for health conditions using machine learning, and created robust backend functionality with Django and SQLite.

projects.title: Movie Recommender
projects.subtitle: Content-Based Filtering
projects.desc: Developed a movie recommendation system using content-based filtering techniques. Implemented the core recommendation logic using Pandas, NumPy, and Scikit-learn.
